equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: sovereign-agent Phase 2 work pricing exists, but the audited code has no CLI_AGENT_PRECOMPILE/AGENT_CALL_PRECOMPILE branch that applies the same work-based pricing to both addresses.

checked_queries: sovereign agent work metrics delivery result
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Both AGENT_CALL_PRECOMPILE and CLI_AGENT_PRECOMPILE are not routed to work-based agent Phase 2 pricing; the CLI-agent address/symbol is absent from the audited code.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs applies calculate_agent_fees_phase2_work only when contract_job.precompile_address == SOVEREIGN_AGENT_PRECOMPILE.

crates/ritual-async-fees/src/lib.rs calculate_async_fees_phase2 handles long-running, ZK, and persistent-agent addresses, not CLI_AGENT_PRECOMPILE or AGENT_CALL_PRECOMPILE; those symbols were not found in audited repos.

notes: Current sovereign-agent work pricing is related but insufficient for the invariant naming both agent and CLI agent precompiles.
rationale: The claimed assignment contains a single source candidate for this behavior, so the refined invariant preserves its statement directly. Source rationale: The combined merge diff changes the Phase 2 fee branch from only AGENT_CALL_PRECOMPILE to AGENT_CALL_PRECOMPILE || CLI_AGENT_PRECOMPILE and updates logging to Agent/CLI Phase 2 pricing.
statement: During Phase 2 settlement creation, both AGENT_CALL_PRECOMPILE and CLI_AGENT_PRECOMPILE must use work-based agent pricing from delivery result metrics instead of falling into non-agent delivery pricing.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create Phase 2 settlements for AGENT_CALL_PRECOMPILE and CLI_AGENT_PRECOMPILE with identical iterations/tool_calls and assert both use calculate_agent_fees_phase2_work and produce the same work-based executor fee.
summary: CLI-agent Phase 2 work pricing is not implemented.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Create Phase 2 settlements for the expected agent and CLI-agent precompile addresses and assert both use calculate_agent_fees_phase2_work; the CLI-agent branch is absent locally.
title: CLI agent uses agent Phase 2 pricing
